'''Widget''' was [[Mora]]'s [[Droid/Legends|droid]] assistant on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==Characteristics==
Widget was a short, bipedal [[Droid/Legends|droid]]<ref name="EGTD" /> with a primarily yellow and brown body.<ref name="RoC1">[[River of Chaos 1|''River of Chaos'' 1]]</ref> He wore a red handkerchief around his neck on occasion. Widget was constructed by [[Mora]] when she was in her early teens. It took a half dozen failed attempts to initialize the droid's [[Droid brain/Legends|cognitive processor]].<ref name="EGTD" />

A cymbal-shaped pan sat atop Widget's head, and his face was almost hidden beneath it. He had two red [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]], and a [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]] that was flawed and resulted in Widget talking in a stutter during times of stress. Two power cables sprouted from the top of his head, connecting to a [[Power generator/Legends|power generator]] on Widget's back. The cables doubled as antennae.<ref name="EGTD" /> 

Widget had short, stubby legs and a broad, weighted base that gave him a waddling, uneven stride and a low center of [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]]. His flexible midsection supported an [[Armor/Legends|armored]] torso, which housed a recessed control panel used for inputting commands and performing diagnostics when the droid was powered down or idle.<ref name="EGTD" />

The droid's arms ended in square hands with blunt fingers. Each arm contained dozens of small machinist's tools that could extended through the hand's digits and palms. The right forearm contained a [[magnifier]], a [[Spot-luma|spotlight luma]], and a range of [[wire cutter]]s. A [[Laser welder/Legends|laser welder]], [[gripper clamps]], and a [[Scomp link/Legends|computer-access link]] were contained in the left arm.<ref name="EGTD" />

However, Widget suffered from frequent system glitches. Mora reconstructed the droid on a monthly basis, which helped her to hone her skills.<ref name="EGTD" />

==History==
[[File:WidgetDiagram-FF93.png|thumb|right|200px|A diagram of some of Widget's functions]]
When Mora was eighteen, she was operating her own repair ship in [[N'croth]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]]. Widget worked alongside her, and his work and in-built tools helped to make Mora a better [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]].<ref name="EGTD" /> 

Following the battle of Yavin, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] came to M'haeli to support the local insurgency in their fight against Governor [[Grigor (governor)|Grigor]]. Widget proved to be of worth, helping the team rescue prisoners from Grigor's mines and retrieving coded data on the corrupt governor's illegal activities. He assisted [[Mora]] with her repairs business, and joined her when she went offworld with [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]] and [[Ch'no]] to join the wider [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]].
